transcription.text: Mr. Van Dyke, you're here to play Touché. The object, get four pieces of your color in a row. But Touché has a hidden force that may flip a piece to your opponent's color. So you may outwit your opponent, but can you beat the force? Touché, the unique strategy game with a hidden force that changes every game. Touché, Mr. Van Dyke, you beat the force. This time. Touché by Gabriel.

segments.text: Mr. Van Dyke, you're here to play Touché.
The object, get four pieces of your color in a row.
But Touché has a hidden force that may flip a piece to your opponent's color.
So you may outwit your opponent, but can you beat the force?
Touché, the unique strategy game with a hidden force that changes every game.
Touché, Mr. Van Dyke, you beat the force.
